body_txt: While men don't have menopause like women, there's still the taboo of having a child at age 50 or older, and children from older parents can have health risks. These men are often part of a May–December Romance . A man can have a child at an old age for a variety of reasons:  Spear Counterpart of Absurdly Elderly Mother . Contrast Supernaturally Young Parent , when the parent is Really 700 Years Old and their child looks older. Can lead to becoming an Absurdly Elderly Grandfather or the father being mistaken for his child's grandfather.
